news.title:
United Breweries' CHRO, Ms. Kavita Singh, resigns effective April 30, 2026.
The company appreciates her contributions and shared the resignation details on its website.
news.summary:
United Breweries' CHRO, Ms. Kavita Singh, resigns effective April 30, 2026.
The company appreciates her contributions and shared the resignation details on its website.

news.title:
United Breweries Ltd faces tax demand of ₹22.5 crore from Maharashtra VAT Dept for FY 2021-22.
UBL plans to appeal the order, expecting no financial impact except minimal statutory pre-deposit.
news.summary:
United Breweries Ltd faces tax demand of ₹22.5 crore from Maharashtra VAT Dept for FY 2021-22.
UBL plans to appeal the order, expecting no financial impact except minimal statutory pre-deposit.

news.title:
JPMorgan downgrades United Breweries to Underweight, sets Rs 1,415 target citing high input costs and pricing issues.
It prefers Marico, Nestle, Tata Consumer defensively; sees better risk-reward in Britannia, HUL, Varun Beverages.
news.summary:
JPMorgan downgrades United Breweries to Underweight, sets Rs 1,415 target citing high input costs and pricing issues.
It prefers Marico, Nestle, Tata Consumer defensively; sees better risk-reward in Britannia, HUL, Varun Beverages.

news.title:
United Breweries executed a block trade of ~1,000,085 shares at Rs. 1569.8.
The total transaction value amounted to Rs. 156.99 crores.
news.summary:
United Breweries executed a block trade of ~1,000,085 shares at Rs. 1569.8.
The total transaction value amounted to Rs. 156.99 crores.

news.title:
Elara Capital upgrades United Breweries to 'Accumulate,' raising target price to Rs 1,900 on Karnataka excise policy changes.
Policy shift could drive 25% volume growth, boosting UBL's revenue, margins, and market presence in Karnataka’s economy segment.
news.summary:
Elara Capital upgrades United Breweries to 'Accumulate,' raising target price to Rs 1,900 on Karnataka excise policy changes.
Policy shift could drive 25% volume growth, boosting UBL's revenue, margins, and market presence in Karnataka’s economy segment.

news.title:
United Breweries faces margin pressure due to rising input costs from the West Asia war, impacting profitability.
Policy changes in states like Maharashtra and Karnataka may support growth; localization aims to manage costs.
news.summary:
United Breweries faces margin pressure due to rising input costs from the West Asia war, impacting profitability.
Policy changes in states like Maharashtra and Karnataka may support growth; localization aims to manage costs.

news.title:
United Breweries gets approval for a new brewery in Uttar Pradesh.
The move signals growth in production capabilities and expansion efforts.
news.summary:
United Breweries gets approval for a new brewery in Uttar Pradesh.
The move signals growth in production capabilities and expansion efforts.

news.title:
United Breweries faces GST demand of ₹31.9 crore on land lease and beverage classification.
₹11.1 crore paid under protest; company exploring legal options amid regulatory ambiguity.
news.summary:
United Breweries faces GST demand of ₹31.9 crore on land lease and beverage classification.
₹11.1 crore paid under protest; company exploring legal options amid regulatory ambiguity.

news.title:
State excise policy changes may benefit liquor majors like United Spirits and United Breweries.
UP policy changes could positively impact Radico Khaitan.
news.summary:
State excise policy changes may benefit liquor majors like United Spirits and United Breweries.
UP policy changes could positively impact Radico Khaitan.

news.title:
Karnataka's liquor deregulation boosts interest in United Spirits, United Breweries, and Allied Blenders.
These companies are emerging as top picks on Dalal Street due to regulatory changes.
news.summary:
Karnataka's liquor deregulation boosts interest in United Spirits, United Breweries, and Allied Blenders.
These companies are emerging as top picks on Dalal Street due to regulatory changes.

news.title:
Indiamart Intermesh saw a 61.5x volume spike to 3.16L shares, stock rose 0.4% to Rs.2082.
Kirloskar, Sapphire Foods, United Breweries, Jupiter Wagons also saw significant volume surges and price increases.
news.summary:
Indiamart Intermesh saw a 61.5x volume spike to 3.16L shares, stock rose 0.4% to Rs.2082.
Kirloskar, Sapphire Foods, United Breweries, Jupiter Wagons also saw significant volume surges and price increases.

news.title:
United Breweries' Dec 2025 net sales rose 3.6% Y-o-Y to Rs 2,072.7 cr, net profit surged 110.9% to Rs 81 cr.
EBITDA grew 56.2% Y-o-Y to Rs 236.8 cr; EPS increased to Rs 3.06 from Rs 1.45.
news.summary:
United Breweries' Dec 2025 net sales rose 3.6% Y-o-Y to Rs 2,072.7 cr, net profit surged 110.9% to Rs 81 cr.
EBITDA grew 56.2% Y-o-Y to Rs 236.8 cr; EPS increased to Rs 3.06 from Rs 1.45.

news.title:
United Breweries Ltd partners with Soufflet Malt to build a new malthouse in India.
The first phase of the facility is expected to be commissioned at the beginning of next year.
news.summary:
United Breweries Ltd partners with Soufflet Malt to build a new malthouse in India.
The first phase of the facility is expected to be commissioned at the beginning of next year.

news.title:
United Breweries cuts fresh order demand from 1.02B to 32.1M.
Reduction raises concerns over sales and market performance.
news.summary:
United Breweries cuts fresh order demand from 1.02B to 32.1M.
Reduction raises concerns over sales and market performance.

news.title:
United Breweries Ltd faces tax demand reduced from INR 1,024 Cr to INR 321 Cr after appeal.
Dispute involves disallowance of capital contributions; company plans further appeal.
news.summary:
United Breweries Ltd faces tax demand reduced from INR 1,024 Cr to INR 321 Cr after appeal.
Dispute involves disallowance of capital contributions; company plans further appeal.

news.title:
United Breweries recovers old dues from Telangana, addressing past issues.
However, the company faces mounting current dues, raising financial concerns.
news.summary:
United Breweries recovers old dues from Telangana, addressing past issues.
However, the company faces mounting current dues, raising financial concerns.

news.title:
United Breweries projects 6-7% long-term volume growth despite current challenges.
Cost-saving initiatives aim to reduce gross costs by 3-6% from 2026-2028.
news.summary:
United Breweries projects 6-7% long-term volume growth despite current challenges.
Cost-saving initiatives aim to reduce gross costs by 3-6% from 2026-2028.

news.title:
United Breweries Ltd shared an audio recording of its Q3 FY2026 earnings call.
The recording is available on the company's website and via an external link.
news.summary:
United Breweries Ltd shared an audio recording of its Q3 FY2026 earnings call.
The recording is available on the company's website and via an external link.

news.title:
United Breweries Q3 net profit surges to 808M INR from 382M YoY.
Q3 revenue declines to 39.4B INR from 44.2B YoY.
news.summary:
United Breweries Q3 net profit surges to 808M INR from 382M YoY.
Q3 revenue declines to 39.4B INR from 44.2B YoY.

news.title:
United Breweries saw a block trade of ~386,959 shares at Rs. 1414.2.
The trade's total value amounted to Rs. 54.7 crores.
news.summary:
United Breweries saw a block trade of ~386,959 shares at Rs. 1414.2.
